headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on KeyCorp, Raises Price Target to $26
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Manan Gosalia   maintains KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $24 to $26.
